title: dactylorhiza gemmana
intro: Dactylorhiza gemmana, also known as the Gemman Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. Consuming the plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, Dactylorhiza gemmana can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
